summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 open candidate PRs. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive PRs were routed to central security handling; non-security PRs were kept for maintainer/backlog handling rather than closure or merge because this shard is not a dedupe cluster and merge/fix actions are blocked.

actions.reason: Related to an already-fixed talk.config family, but recent maintainer activity and failing proof/checks make closure inappropriate.
Substantial draft maintainer-review PR; keep in the inventory, no closure or merge action.
Security-sensitive network/auth-boundary work is out of ProjectClownfish backlog-cleanup scope.
Valid but blocked PR needing proof/conflict resolution; keep related to the inventory rather than close.
Potentially useful focused PR, but it needs maintainer/review resolution outside this plan-only inventory pass.
Delegated auth and token-boundary work must be routed to central security handling.
Narrow Telegram behavior PR related to broader Telegram bot-mode work, but not safe to close or merge.
Potentially useful channel/plugin SDK feature PR, blocked by proof/review status.
The hydrated artifact explicitly marks this PR security-sensitive; route only this item and continue unrelated classifications.
Strong candidate for maintainer review, but plan mode and blocked merge actions limit this to non-mutating classification.
